---
name: Share a configuration
about: You were suuuuper nice and you made a configuration that you want to share with the rest of the world! (or just your prom, that's fine too...)
title: "[USER CONFIG] Here's the configuration for [Section] - [Year] - [Prom] - [ConfigName]"
labels: user config sumbition
assignees: Batkillulu

---
> Feel free to write in French or in English! Vous pouvez écrire en français ou en anglais! Mais je vais partir du principe que vous pouvez comprendre ce que je dis en anglais, c'est pénible en terme de lisibilité et j'ai la flemme de traduire, merci pour votre compréhension :P
> 
> ## **"Hi! Here's the config I made for my prom!"**
> So! You've decided to be helpful and contribute to the online configuration system? Very cool of you, thank you! Here's just a short instruction:
> 
> - Start by exporting your configuration by clicking on "Export config ↑" at the top left corner of the dashboard
> - This will download a ".json" file
> - Provide me with the said file here! You can drag and drop it on the message or click on "Paste, drop, or click to add files" right below this message box, to the left


## **Please, provide the information of your configuration IN THE TITLE (above this message box) so that I know what this configuration corresponds to!**

- Section: Arts et Métiers, Engineering, ...
- Year: AM1, AM2, EENG1, EENG2, ...
- Prom: the number of your promo, P2026, P2027, P2028, ...
- ConfigName: in case this is specific to a pathway or a specialty, like "Robotics", "Supply Chain"... Otherwise, if it's general to your prom, you can just put "Config"


Thank you!
